response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled full-stack and web developer with strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise, but he is fundamentally mismatched for this role. His C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, falling far short of the mandatory 5–10 years. He has no demonstrated Windows platform development, no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and zero exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains. His most recent financial-sector role (RIDE Capital) was purely Node.js/TypeScript with no C++ involvement.
strengths: Broad polyglot background including Java, DLang, C, and some C++ exposure
Strong CI/CD and DevOps experience across multiple roles
One fintech-adjacent role (RIDE Capital) demonstrating financial services environment familiarity
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months professional, one thesis project) versus the required 5–10 years
No capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge whatsoever
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primarily MongoDB and MySQL user on Linux-centric stacks
